chunks.doc_name: Guidance and Useful Information - Public Health - European Union
chunks.text: ![European Commission logo](/themes/contrib/oe_theme/dist/ec/images/logo/logo-ec--mute.svg) # Guidance and Useful Information A range of [guidance documents](/medical-devices-sector/new-regulations/guidance-mdcg-endorsed-documents-and-other-guidance_en) assist stakeholders in implementing the medical devices regulations. [Dedicated factsheets](/medical-devices-new-regulations/getting-ready-new-regulations_en) provide a summarised view of the main areas of activities in the medical devices sector. Relevant contacts for the medical devices sector, including Competent Authorities and stakeholders are publicly available. ## Latest updates ## Documents ![](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2021-12/events-icon.jpg?h=f2329d93&itok=W42yCN2F) ![](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2021-12/publications-icon.jpg?h=f2329d93&itok=_e0oEKA8) Share this page ![European Commission logo](/themes/contrib/oe_theme/dist/ec/images/logo/negative/logo-ec--en.svg) Follow the European Commission
